programmes.show_description: Programmes Start at 07:00.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'gloves', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see gold gloves, spotty gloves, kitten mitten gloves and help Dee find her other glove.
A Lick of Paint: As spring arrives, Mole and his friends paint his burrow. But while they are immersed in their work, the weasels look for for a chance to play a prank on them.
Captain Ratty: Ratty takes his friends out for a boat trip and insists, as captain, that what he says goes.
Corn: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Corn singing an A-maiz-ing Counting Song about his remarkably organised kernel rows.
Plum: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Plum performing the Sugar Plum Fairy Bounce and attempting to do not one, not two, but three pirouettes in midair!
Billy is worried he was going to miss all his friends and family when he goes to camp so his friends thought of a way to cheer him up.
Marvin loses his favourite rock, and when no other rock will do, Oona helps him to get the old one back from the seagulls!
Mama and Papa are taking Oona and Baba on a family outing to experience something special - but they need to find the perfect spot!
Dawn Chorus: Join Séamus the farm dog on his adventures in the wild as he searches for birds to teach him to sing the dawn chorus.
At school, some of the cats aren't all that impressed that Flix is a dog, so he emBARKS on a mission to find his true super power by turning himself into Super Flix!
Zigzag's Skunk Spray: Tis a stinky scene when Zigzag's skunk friend mistakenly sprays her. Enter Vida's special soap!
The Vida the Vet Book: Sunny tags along on house calls to interview Vida for his book...about her. It's a musical!
Switcheroo: When the twins forget an important gadget needed for Ayana's school play, Jonathan must leave in the middle of the play to get it.
Building the Dream: When their young neighbour CeCe comes over to visit, Drew and Jonathan share the story of how the Dream Factory came to be.
When Mike hears eerie singing and glowing lights in the sea near the lighthouse, he calls Agent Price and Agent Sparkes to check it out.
When Hannah shows off a homemade kite, her stunts cause a barbequing accident, sparking multiple fires!
Joe & Ozzy are off to the park to make some deliveries and to take part in a treasure hunt. (SL)
Joe makes some deliveries to the airport. They are missing an aeroplane! He uses magic to help the Pilot, and even gets to take a trip in the sky with his helper Noomi! (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Sheep Stampede: Diesel tells Nia that using her whistle to find Farmer McColl's sheep isn't fair, so she tries not to use it.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: The Berry Best: Thomas goes too far when taking 'just a few' strawberries again and again uses up all the fruit in Farmer McColl's field.

programmes.show_name: Andy's Global Adventures: Baby Animal Missions
programmes.show_description: Andy and the Meerkat Pups: Andy, Jen and Scout head to Botswana, Africa to help a meerkat family move home.
Mum's friend Mairead gives Punky a present: a tin whistle. Punky loves it, but she's not exactly an expert.
Níl Sonia sásta nuair nach bhfuil sí in ann a seaicéad tarrthála a dhúnadh as a stuaim féin.
An mbeidh Sonia agus Hugo in ann an muileann a chur ag gluaiseacht gan aon ghaoth?
Lily finds Delilah's winch handle washed up on the beach, and as a reward Salty gives Lily a ball, but when it gets soggy, Lily and Gull invent a new game - Splatball.
The youngster briefly glimpses a big blue rock in the sky, but Salty thinks she has been imagining things, so the pair set out to find it again.
Pre-animation series following a little girl called Mya, who has a lot of infectious enthusiasm and a fearless sense of adventure.
Maidin bháistí í i mBaile Gach Aon Lá... agus tá Mya ag féachaint trí leabhragán Mama is Dada Go.
Lá breá gréine eile é i mBaile Gach Aon Lá agus tá Mya is Sammy ag fanúint le Mamó is Daideo Go don deireadh seachtaine
Animated adventure. The pond has frozen over, so Nelly and Nora help the ducks find the water again.
The sisters want to enjoy a sunset picnic but the annoying midges just won't leave them alone.
When a box disappears Kiva, Saul, Angus and a new friend come up with a way to find it.
Mini gets an idea to build a listening device to find Jeremey who has got lost in some rotten apples.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'gloves', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure! We see gold gloves, spotty gloves, kitten mitten gloves and help Dee find her other glove.
Henry meets a football. He helps the football get to an important match.
Switcheroo: When the twins forget an important gadget needed for Ayana's school play, Jonathan must leave in the middle of the play to get it.
Building the Dream: When their young neighbour CeCe comes over to visit, Drew and Jonathan share the story of how the Dream Factory came to be.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: When a horrible smell ruins everyone's day at the beach, Cheese mistakenly believes she is growing stinky and is too embarrassed to go out.
Rooney and Hare get lost in the woods.

Joe makes some deliveries to the airport. They are missing an aeroplane! He uses magic to help the Pilot, and even gets to take a trip in the sky with his helper Noomi! (SL)

Programmes Start at 07:00.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'scooter', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.
Roughing It: When Toad decides to camp near the riverbank and live a simple life, the Weasels grab the opportunity to take over Toad Hall.
Lights Camera Disaster: Toad recruits his friends to help make a superhero film.
Celery: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's Celery performing We're Here to Grow - if he manages to squeeze himself out of the dressing room on time.
Pineapple: Live from the Roots and Fruits theatre, it's the magical Pineapple attempting to perform a very difficult magic trick with the help of Kiwi.
It's another dramatic day in Bright's park as Clara confuses everyone while practising for her new drama group.
When double act Phoenix and Mossy find Spiky far away from his burrows, they decide to take him home.
Bernie takes an underground adventure while minding Baba and Lala. There's still life in the old shell yet!
Sheep, Llama & Pine Marten: When practicing to be a sheep dog, Séamus meets some funny-looking sheep with long necks. On his way home, he stumbles upon a playful young family of pine martens.
At school, Flix is ready to live it up while the teachers are on an away day at Rulestock (a convention about boring school rules). But a substitute teacher arrives.
Koa's Sweet Tooth: Koa the tiger loves sweets and his teeth hurt, but he doesn't know why! A check-up reveals that he has bacteria in his mouth from all that sugar.
Toby's Blurry Blunders: When Toby the gopher has trouble catching a ball, and doing pretty much everything else, Vida gives him an eye exam and learns he can't see very well.
Roboto Reboot: When Carlos can't find his robot, Roboto, the Brothers decide to 3D print him a new, slightly smaller version.
Steamport Summer Celebration: Drew is having trouble writing a speech, but when the Dream Factory Crew set out to restore the old Steamport Ferris wheel, Drew is inspired.
When James plans a cafe makeover for the Wholefish Cafe, he becomes over-zealous which leads to a series of events that cause a fire.
On a wildlife sketching trip, Norman wants to find the most spectacular creature to sketch, but this gets a bit tricky when Lily Chen tags along.
Joe's thrilled that he's going to visit the stables but is gutted when he realises that there is a lot of work to do before he can get on a horse and ride it. (SL)
The Library needs a new shelf unit, a picture for the wall and a new children's book. When Joe hasn't got a book for children in his delivery bike he decides to ask Sadie to help. (SL)

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Creepy Crawly Courage: Yong Bao's fear of creepy crawlies and Carly's disgust for skunks complicate their apple delivery to the Harvest Festival.

programmes.show_name: Thomas and Friends: All Engines Go
programmes.show_description: Windmill Woes: After Thomas, Percy and Diesel accidentally break a windmill, they all tell Gordon different version of what happened. Can Gordon uncover the truth?

programmes.show_name: Andy's Global Adventures: Baby Animal Missions
programmes.show_description: Andy and the Baby Lar Gibbons: Andy, Jen, and Scout head to Thailand on a baby animal mission to find out how infant gibbons travel through the treetops.
Mum has a cold. The Chemist says what she needs is plenty of rest. It's Punky's job to make sure Cranky, Con and Rufus don't make a sound so Mum wont be disturbed.
Tagann Hugo agus Sonia ar mhapa a thugann chomh fada le taisce an-speisialta iad.
Foghlaimíonn Sonia go bhfuil sé tábhachtach éisteacht leis an scéal iomlán.
Lily discovers an old compass washed up on the beach. It comes in very handy when Bull seems to be in trouble up on the Great North Cliff, and Hatsie and Lily race to his rescue.
Lily finds a napkin on the beach. It's just the thing for the Driftwood Bay picnic, and Lily finds Bull talking to his friend, Bee. When Bee vanishes, Lily helps Bull find him.
Síofra and Oisín are looking for the source of an unusual smell. Rúbaí demonstrates how to make bubbles. Gearóid celebrates his birthday.
The sun shows special things to the two sisters.
On a cold morning, Nelly and Nora have fun drawing animals on the fogged-up windows.
Kiva, Saul and Angus look to the past to solve a mystery in the present.
It's Bity's ballet lesson, and Itsy is joining her for the first time.
Dee encourages a friend to say 'scooter', and we go on a whirlwind word adventure.
A friendly shield tells Henry about a missing sword, kidnapped by a ferocious dragon.
Roboto Reboot: When Carlos can't find his robot, Roboto, the Brothers decide to 3D print him a new, slightly smaller version.
Steamport Summer Celebration: Drew is having trouble writing a speech, but when the Dream Factory Crew set out to restore the old Steamport Ferris wheel, Drew is inspired.

programmes.show_name: Boy Girl Dog Cat Mouse Cheese
programmes.show_description: The boys convince their grandfather to take Cactus Town with him to the playground, where he will then meet again with an old friend.
Afraid to confess that they accidentally ate Mrs Cuckoo's famous pie, Rooney and Hare make another pie to replace it. How hard can it be?
Joe's thrilled that he's going to visit the stables but is gutted when he realises that there is a lot of work to do before he can get on a horse and ride it. (SL)
The Library needs a new shelf unit, a picture for the wall and a new children's book. When Joe hasn't got a book for children in his delivery bike he decides to ask Sadie to help. (SL)
